items.title: Discord 社区日报 (2026-04-10)
items.summary: 今日 2,541 条消息，159 位活跃用户，351 次反应。热门频道：🔸morimens-game-chat(1565)、🔸phòng-chat-tiếng-việt(329)、🔸綜合討論(148)、🔸general-chat(93)、🔸game-question(89)
items.author: Discord Archiver

items.title: [DC] far0w1@🔸有問必答┊official-q-a: As a slay the spire player the dtide is really the least roguelite mode there is
items.summary:
As a slay the spire player the dtide is really the least roguelite mode there is, which is fine for an end game mode but not when there are upgrade and gear mode behind it. Fine if I have to play the mode at least allow us to auto farm it, so I can get the materials for account progression and play the mode I like for example the new train mode.

I actually don’t like either the dive or the dtide especially when there is forced exploration without stories, without enough rng and deck-building these mode feel very repetitive and not really like the challenges you see in slay the spire. With upgrade materials gated behind end game it’s a catch 22 situation.
items.author: far0w1

items.title: [DC] morimensstaff06@🔸有問必答┊official-q-a: Perhaps it's a translation issue, so I'll revise the wording: Some awakened unit
items.summary:
Perhaps it's a translation issue, so I'll revise the wording: Some awakened units are positioned to need or be suited to cooperate with others in battle, but Orita is not like that—her strength lies in being effective even without coordination.
  └ vxvendetta97: Ok, but what we say is that she is not strong by herself or with a dedicated team, and she absolutely need a dedicated team to be at least usable.
She and Corposant are the only team that really use the discard mechanic, and have a lot of synergy, but even together they perform worse than others.
  └ vxvendetta97: If the team doesn't want to buff her because she is a welfare unit, or because they don't like to receive direct suggestions on discord, we must accept it, but if they want to effectively discuss why they think she or others are in a good balance state, and don't want to make even minor changes, we would appreciate it.
If there are translation difficulties, I can enlist the help of a translator.
items.author: morimensstaff06
